text:
User: add a settings button on the top right tab bar

thus far it allows me to logout (move the logout button there)
and to reset the local database [...] Changed:
- [App.swift](/Users/pablofernandez/Work/29er/ios/29er/29er/App.swift:79): replaced the top-right `Log Out` button with a gear `Settings` menu.
- [App.swift](/Users/pablofernandez/Work/29er/ios/29er/29er/App.swift:87): moved `Log Out` into that menu and added `Reset Local Database`.
- [App.swift](/Users/pablofernandez/Work/29er/ios/29er/29er/App.swift:105): added a destructive confirmation dialog for database reset. [...] - UI snapshot showed `Settings`, then menu entries `Log Out` and `Reset Local Database`.
- Tapped reset only far enough to verify the confirmation dialog appeared; I did not confirm the destructive action.
